name: Fired Heater Thermal Efficiency — Stack Loss, Excess Air Optimisation & Process Duty
subtitle: Oil & Gas Processing | Energy Management — API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery), ISO 13705:2006
standardsBasis: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)

inScope: Fired Heater Thermal Efficiency — Stack Loss, Excess Air Optimisation & Process Duty
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Flue Gas O₂ Content at Stack (dry basis)
Radiation & Convection Losses (% of fired duty)

standards.code: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)
standards.name: Fired Heater Thermal Efficiency — Stack Loss, Excess Air Optimisation & Process Duty
standards.description: Fired Heater Thermal Efficiency — Stack Loss, Excess Air Optimisation & Process Duty — Oil & Gas Processing, Energy Management

formulas.reference: API 560 §A.3 — excess air from dry O₂: EA% = O₂% × 100 / (21 − O₂%)
ASME PTC 4-2013 — linearised flue gas c_p

formulas.expression: 11.5 * fuel_carbon_content_pct / 100; m_fg_kg_kg = m_air_stoich * (1 + XS_air_pct/100) + 1; Q_stack_pct = m_fg_kg_kg * cp_fg_kj_kg_k * (stack_temp_c - ambient_temp_c) / fuel_LHV_kj_kg * 100
formulas.reference: API 560 / ISO 13705:2006 §8.2 — dry flue gas stack loss
API 560 §4.3 — fired duty = fuel rate × LHV

warnings.source: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)
warnings.message: Excess air > 25%: significant stack loss penalty — each 10% excess air at 300°C stack increases stack loss ≈ 0.5%; install O₂ trim controller

warnings.source: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)
warnings.message: Thermal efficiency < 85%: below API 560 design target for natural gas fuel — assess convection section tube cleaning and air preheater condition

warnings.source: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)
warnings.message: Stack ΔT > 350 K: air preheater economiser has strong ROI — each 20°C stack temp reduction raises efficiency ≈ 1%

warnings.source: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)
warnings.message: High O₂ (>6%) on large heater: major energy waste — reduce excess air to 2–3% target; NOₓ and stack loss both decrease

warnings.source: API 560 5th Ed. (Fired Heaters for General Refinery)
warnings.message: High radiation loss (>3%): check casing and refractory integrity — hot spots and casing leaks waste energy and create safety hazard

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required

legalNotice: ⚠ Engineering decision support only — verify before use. This is a technical simulation, not professional engineering advice.
